'Customer has shown interest in solution', 'Conducted POC / Demo', 'In evaluation / planning stage', 'Agreed on solution to Business Problem', 'Completed Action Plan', 'Finalized Deployment Need', 'pattern' => '(?=.{1,128}$)([\\p{L}\\p{Z}\\p{N}_.:/=+\\-@]*)', ], 'TagKeyList' => [ 'type' => 'list', 'member' => [ 'shape' => 'TagKey', ], 'max' => 50, 'min' => 1, ], 'TagList' => [ 'type' => 'list',
